productDisplayName: Nike Men's Encourage The Rookies Grey T-shirt
description: CompositionGrey round neck short sleeved t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with graphic print and flock detailing on the front, grey fabric tape on the inseam of the neckline and logo printed on the frontFittingRegularWash care Machine wash cold with like colors Do not bleach Remove immediately Do not allow to lay on itself when wet Tumble dry low Cool iron Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Do not dry clean If rap music is your passion, then this t-shirt belongs to your wardrobe. With a clever rap printed on the front, this grey tee from nike looks uber cool and works as an excellent conversation starter. Made of pure cotton, it keeps you fresh and dry all day, as you enjoy catching everyone's eye. Pair it jeans and lifestyle footwear for a cool casual look.
